---
title: "Load Data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### Source functions

```{r}
source("../R/99_proj_func.R")
```

### Loading libraries

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyr)
library(R.utils)
library(httr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
library(jsonlite)
library(illuminaio)
```

### Load files

```{r}
raw_dir <- "../_raw/"
download_dataset_ncbi(raw_dir)

#ncbi_data <- read_unstructured_ncbi_table(str_c(raw_dir, "raw_ncbi_data.txt.gz"))

#ncbi_data |> sample_n(5)
```
